subcodes.first_line: The vicissitudes of time, which have manifested as God's irresistible decrees, have separated companions who once shared the same nest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اختلافات روزگار که از قضایای مبرم الهی ظاهر شده یاران هم آشیان را از هم فصل
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love as fire, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
